generate.description: Generate a QR code PNG end to end: apply text and display options in the UI, then save the image. Same result as typing in the editor and clicking save.

text.description: Content encoded in the QR code

path.description: Absolute path to save the PNG file

size.description: QR code size in pixels (100-2000). Defaults to the current UI setting.

fgColor.description: Foreground color as #RRGGBB. Defaults to the current UI setting.

bgColor.description: Background color as #RRGGBB. Defaults to the current UI setting.

correctLevel.description: Error correction level. Defaults to the current UI setting.

iconPath.description: Absolute path to a center icon image. Omit to clear any existing icon.

decode.description: Decode a QR code from an image file. Updates the plugin scan result UI and returns the text.

path.description: Absolute path to an image containing a QR code
